package rulefixtures

// scenario for url_parse_in_loop_on_invariant_base: url.Parse(...) or ParseRequestURI(...) observed inside loops with a stable-looking base input.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule372PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario372Positive(records []Rule372PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
